name: Global Core
summary: Universal quality improvement and patient-safety source profile. Use this when the country-specific governance route is unknown or when building portable agent behaviour.

sources.title: Model for Improvement
sources.use: aims, measures, changes, and PDSA cycles as the universal improvement method

sources.title: SQUIRE 2.0
sources.organisation: Standards for Quality Improvement Reporting Excellence
sources.use: international reporting structure for healthcare improvement work

sources.title: Global Patient Safety Action Plan 2021-2030
sources.use: global patient-safety framing and policy context

incident_learning.position: Incident learning is adjacent to QIP, not identical to QIP. Use it to identify system learning and improvement actions; convert actions into QIP only when there is a defined aim, measures, change theory, and follow-up.
boundaries: do not treat incident review as publication-ready QIP by itself
do not process identifiable incident narratives in public or generic agent tools
check local disclosure, duty of candour, and investigation requirements
